findings: Book continues to strengthen tick-over-tick: snapshot 10:13:42 marks total NAV ₹1,004,357.99 (+₹1,190 vs 09:43 snapshot), daily P&L +₹8,704.10 (+0.87% of NAV) up from +₹7,586.10 (+0.76%) at 10:00. Pre-armed trigger inventory for 11:00 risk_assessment: (A3) If 3rd NEW BUY admitted by 11:00 AND projected full-fill deployment > 60% → tighten max_deployed_pct 0.65 → 0.62. actions_taken: NO override changes this tick. Rationale: (i) Book continues IMPROVING — daily P&L +0.87% up from +0.76% at 10:00; cumulative now positive +0.44% (fully recovered from Day-6 trough). (ii) ALL pre-armed triggers from 10:00 (A2-E2) DORMANT with comfortable buffers; no new firing trigger. (iii) Strategy cadence remains measured (1 NEW BUY in 80 min vs Day-5 4-BUYs-in-60-min that originally fired the cap stack); no SECOND admission in the 10:00→10:30 window. (iv) ALL guardrails binding with measurable buffer: deployment 15.11 pp on filled book / 10.33 pp on GLENMARK full-fill; sector caps 9.70+ pp on every cluster; position cap 2.70 pp on largest name (NESTLEIND); SL bands all clean with no holding below SL. (v) Decoratively tightening on a healthy, positive, recently-de-risked book at 10:30 of Day-7 would friction the strategy without addressing any live risk vector — same rationale as 10:00 hold. Current override stack (min_confidence 0.65, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.65, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04, daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04, max_sector_pct 0.22) remains correctly calibrated and is NOT relaxed. Pharma full-fill projection (10.02%) and stale TATAPOWER/PHARMABEES OPENs are noted for OBSERVATION; pre-armed triggers (A3)-(G3) capture the next firing conditions for the 11:00 tick.
